zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich von Berg Herr zu Windeck於1247年之前出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海-希-可萊斯文德可時，他的父親Adolf IV. von Berg24歲，母親Marguerite de Hochstaden32歲。他於1264年之前與Agnes von der Mark在海因里希_結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1296年3月8日在德國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich von Berg Herr zu Windeck于1247年之前出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海-希-可萊斯文德可时，他的父亲Adolf IV. von Berg24岁，母亲Marguerite de Hochstaden32岁。他于1264年之前与Agnes von der Mark在海因里希_结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1296年3月8日在德国。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Berg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lennart, Bjorn, Lars, Nils, Alf, Nels, Thor, Tor, Knute, Selmer, Anders.

German and Dutch: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill or mountain, from Middle High German berc, Middle Dutch berghe. This surname is also found in some other parts of Europe, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland. Compare Dutch Vandenberg .
Norwegian and Danish: habitational name from a farmstead named with Old Norse bjarg ‘mountain, hill’.

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

variants.name: Bergh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Johan, Anders, Arndt, Owe, Per, Sigvard, Sven, Syvert.
Scandinavian: variant of   Berg  .
Dutch and English: topographic name denoting someone living on or by a hill, Middle Dutch berghe, Middle English bergh ‘hill’ (Old English beorg). Compare Dutch Berg and Vandenbergh .

variants.name: Vandenberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Dirk, Marinus, Gerrit, Gerritt, Hendrik, Jacobus, Maarten, Pieter, Wim, Albertus, Durk, Hendrick.
Dutch (Van den Berg) and Flemish (also Van den Berg): topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, Middle Dutch berghe. Compare Berg .

variants.name: Berglin
meanings: Swedish: variant of Berg + the suffix -lin, derived from Latin -(l)inius ‘relating to’.

variants.name: Berget
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Knut.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farm names especially in eastern Norway named with the definite singular form of berg ‘mountain, hill’ (see Berg ).
French: topographic name, a derivative of   Berge   ‘river bank’.

variants.name: Baerg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Kurt.
German (Bärg): variant of Berg .

variants.name: Bergen
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of various places called Bergen.
Dutch and Flemish: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill (see   Berg  ), or a habitational name from any of various places so named (see   Van Bergen  ).
Swedish (mainly Bergén): ornamental or habitational name formed with the (placename) element berg ‘mountain, hill’ + the adjectival suffix -en/-én, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’.

variants.name: Berghorst
meanings: Dutch (Gelderland): topographic name for someone living on or by a hill with shrubberies (see   Berg   and   Horst  ).

variants.name: Barg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernhard, Erwin, Hans, Mathias, Wilfried.
North German:
topographic name for someone who lived on a hill, Low German barg. Compare Berg .

variants.name: Berge
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Maren, Johan, Karsten, Alf, Bent, Erik, Gudmund, Knud, Peer, Per, Sten, Thor.
Norwegian and Swedish: variant of   Berg  , from the dative form. As a Norwegian surname, this is a habitational name from any of numerous farms so named all over the country.
German: topographic name for a person by or on a hill, from an extended form of Berg (formerly with a preposition with dative case, e.g. am Berge).

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from heim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power’. See Henry .

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich von Berg Herr zu Windeck was born before 1247, in Windeck, Rhein-Sieg-Kreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Adolf IV. von Berg, was 24 and his mother, Marguerite de Hochstaden, was 32. He married Agnes von der Mark before 1264, in Prussia. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 March 1296, in Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich von Berg Herr zu Windeck est né avant 1247, à Windeck, Rhein-Sieg-Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Adolf IV. von Berg, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Hochstaden, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Agnes von der Mark avant 1264, à Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 mars 1296, à Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich von Berg Herr zu Windeck vor 1247 in Windeck, Rhein-Sieg-Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adolf IV. von Berg 24 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Hochstaden 32. Er hat vor 1264 in Preußen Agnes von der Mark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. März 1296 in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Berg Herr zu Windeck è nato il prima del 1247 nel Windeck, Rhein-Sieg-Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Adolf IV. von Berg, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Hochstaden, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Agnes von der Mark prima del 1264, nel Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 marzo 1296, nel Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Berg Herr zu Windeckが1247年以前にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンルヘイン-シエグ-クレイスウィンデックで生まれた時，父Adolf IV. von Bergは24歳，母Marguerite de Hochstadenは32歳であった。1264年以前にプレウssンでAgnes von der Markと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1296年3月8日にドイツで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Berg Herr zu Windeck(이)가 1247년 이전 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 리이-시그-크레이스 윈덱에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adolf IV. von Berg(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Hochstaden(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1264년 이전 프레우ss에서 Agnes von der Mark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1296년 3월 8일 독일에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Berg Herr zu Windeck nasceu antes 1247, em Windeck, Rhein-Sieg-Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Adolf IV. von Berg, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Hochstaden, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes von der Mark antes 1264, em Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de março de 1296, em Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich von Berg Herr zu Windeck родился перед 1247 г. в местности виндекк, раин-сиег-крис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Adolf IV. von Berg было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Hochstaden, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes von der Mark перед 1264 г. в местности Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 марта 1296 г. в местности Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich von Berg Herr zu Windeck nació antes de 1247, en Windeck, Rhein-Sieg-Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Adolf IV. von Berg, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Hochstaden, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Agnes von der Mark antes de 1264, en Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1296, en Alemania.
